Off Calendar Aug-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED.

PLAINTIFF DONALD DRUMMOND's Application For Writ Of Attachment is granted in the amount of $51,963.95. No opposition has been filed. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
